title: malva × hybridica
intro: Malva × hybridica, also known as the marshmallow plant, is a hybrid species of the Malva genus, derived from the cross between Malva sylvestris and Malva moschata. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which are attributed to its high mucilage content. Malva × hybridica has been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Malva × hybridica include teas, infusions, and ointments, which are commonly used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
